title: Carpenter v. United States, 585 U.S. 296 (2018) — full opinion (Cornell Legal Information Institute)
author: Supreme Court of the United States (opinion of the Court by Roberts, C.J.)
organization: Cornell Law School — Legal Information Institute
bias_or_interest: Primary judicial record; Cornell LII is a neutral redistributor.
quotation_note: Public-domain U.S. government work; short attributed quotes are safe.
rights_note: Opinion text is public domain. Cite Cornell LII / the slip opinion as access source.
notes: Primary opinion (No. 16-402), 138 S.Ct. 2206. Confirms 5-4, Jun 22 2018, Roberts; ~127 days / ~12,898 points; declined to EXTEND third-party doctrine. NOTE: a separate Cornell LII AI-summary page misreports the vote as 6-3 — disregard; the holding/syllabus is 5-4. Capture durable hash before publish.
